label: work (defining relation for the joule)
semantics: dimensional: dim(lhs) MUST equal dim(rhs) exactly (integer vectors); the record asserts the definitional relation between quantity KINDS, not a world-layer numeric fact
notes: CONFOUNDER exhibit: torque = force·length dimension-checks identically (τ = r × F). The dimension layer cannot and does not distinguish them; the quantity-kind refs in the tree do.
